menu.cursoOnline: Online Course: The Psychology of Reincarnation

footer.tagline: Integrating psychological science and spiritual awakening for over three decades.

1.eyebrow: 30+ years of clinical practice and training
1.description: For over three decades, Dr. Mauro Kwitko — physician, founder and president of the Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy — has worked to integrate Reincarnation into Official Health Institutions as a health subject, not a religious or spiritual one.
1.caption: CRM 5761 · UFRGS · Founder of ABPR

2.description: Access classes, spiritual hymns, e-books, radio and an active community around Reincarnationist Psychotherapy. Everything in one place, curated by Dr. Mauro.
2.caption: Classes, hymns, e-books and community

3.description: Learn at your own pace the foundations of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, condensed from nearly 30 years of clinical practice. R$ 297 — up to 12 installments.
3.caption: Lifetime access · 2 free classes

books.title: Learn With My Books
books.desc: Nearly 30 years of clinical experience condensed into works that guide the path of inner reform.

formacao.desc: A new psychological vision based on Reincarnation, so we can truly take advantage of this incarnation. Complete training for therapists to integrate Regression Therapy into clinical practice.

ebooks.title: Buy or access for free at the Study Club
ebooks.desc: Access the complete e-book library as a Club member.

about.desc: For about 30 years I have devoted myself to guiding people — at the office, in lectures and courses — to remember that we are incarnated Spirits, each with our own purposes.
items: Founder and patron of the Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy (ABPR)
More than 10,000 Inquiries into the Unconscious (Regressions) performed
More than 70 classes graduated from the Reincarnationist Psychotherapy Course

quote.text: Healing is not just the absence of symptoms, but the presence of meaning found on the soul's journey through time.
quote.author: — Dr. Mauro Kwitko

contact.desc: Send me a message so we can talk.

hero.desc: Join a vibrant community of psychotherapists, physicians and other health professionals seeking to deepen inner reform, spirituality and Reincarnationist Psychotherapy.

benefits.title: Active community
benefits.desc: Exchange ideas with professionals pursuing inner reform.

benefits.title: Complete library
benefits.desc: E-books, classes, hymns and recorded course.

perks.ebooksDesc: As a Club member you download and read every e-book published by Dr. Mauro Kwitko at no extra cost — and upcoming releases reach you first.
perks.discountDesc: Members get 20% off any physical book published by Dr. Mauro through the BesouroBox publishing house.

acervo.title: Access all of Dr. Mauro's content
acervo.desc: E-books, classes, lives, hymns and the complete course — all in one place.

features.title: Access E-books and Future Releases
features.desc: Growing digital library of Dr. Mauro Kwitko's works; new releases reach members first.

features.title: Lives and Recorded Classes
features.desc: Live meetings with special guests and a complete library of classes to revisit anytime.

features.title: Recorded Course: Inner Reform
features.desc: Full access to the course "The Psychology of Reincarnation", with over 20 modules.

hinarios.title: Complete hymnals
hinarios.desc: Hymn collections for meditation, study and reflection — Hymns of Peace, Love and Faith.

community.title: A living community
community.desc: The heart of the Club is the exchange between psychotherapists, physicians and other health professionals seeking to deepen inner reform, spirituality and Reincarnationist Psychotherapy — alongside ordinary people enriching this journey.
items: Comment on classes and clinical reports
Get first access to lives with guests
Exchange with professionals from many fields

items.q: What do I get when I subscribe?
items.a: Access to the community, VIP WhatsApp group, live sessions, e-book library, recorded classes, hymns and the complete "Inner Reform" course.
Yes. The subscription is monthly and can be canceled at any time, with no penalty.

items.q: How do I access the content?
items.a: After subscribing you receive immediate access to the platform and the WhatsApp group.
The Club is open to psychotherapists, physicians, health professionals and anyone seeking to deepen inner reform and spirituality.

ctaFinal.title: Your journey begins here
ctaFinal.desc: Join Dr. Mauro Kwitko's community today.
